name: Admiral Thumpback
description: Admiral Thumpback is a sailor counterpart of Thumpback exclusive to Skylanders: Lost Islands.
biography: Admiral Thumpback is a sailor counterpart of Thumpback exclusive to Skylanders: Lost Islands. Unlike the other Lost Islands-exclusive Skylanders, he cannot be owned from the Wishing Well. Instead, you can only get him by paying 2,000 Kudos.
quote: Admiral Thumpback has sailed into the kingdom!
personality: Not much is known about Admiral Thumpback's personality, other than his role as a sailor counterpart to Thumpback.

story.content: Admiral Thumpback is a sailor counterpart of Thumpback exclusive to Skylanders: Lost Islands. Unlike the other Lost Islands-exclusive Skylanders, he cannot be owned from the Wishing Well. Instead, you can only get him by paying 2,000 Kudos.

content: Admiral Thumpback has sailed into the kingdom!

trivia: Admiral Thumpback is the only Lost Islands-exclusive Skylander to be a Giant.
He is also the first Lost Islands-exclusive version of a non-Core Skylander.
He is also the first ingame variant Giant exclusive to the tablet games (the second being Obsidian Hot Head).
He is the second Lost Islands Exclusive Skylander to be released on September (the other being Autumn Stump Smash).
He is also the first Lost Islands exclusive Skylander who was not available in the Wishing Well.
He is the only Lost Islands-exclusive Skylander to be bought by Kudos.
He is also the only Lost Islands-exclusive Skylander who is always available.
gameplay: Admiral Thumpback is the only Lost Islands-exclusive Skylander to be a Giant and the only one that must be bought by Kudos. Unlike other characters in the game, he cannot be obtained through the Wishing Well and is instead always available for purchase for 2,000 Kudos.
